pattern: The pillow bounces back and forth like a ball on a line, so its position after any number of seconds only depends on where you land within one full back-and-forth cycle.
hints: A full round trip from person 1 to person n and back to person 1 takes 2*(n-1) seconds, and the motion repeats identically after every such round trip.
Reduce the elapsed time modulo the length of one round trip to get an equivalent, much smaller amount of time within the very first cycle.

If that reduced time is still within the first leg (less than n), the holder is simply one past that many steps from person 1; otherwise the pillow is already on its way back and the holder is found by counting backward from person n.

edge_inputs.description: time lands exactly at the far end, the turning point
time is exactly one full round trip, back at person 1
time is one more than a full round trip
time spans several full round trips plus a remainder
maximum line length and maximum time together

stress.description: random line lengths and times across the full legal range
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(2, 1000)
    time = rng.randint(1, 1000)
    return [n, time]
